message:
fix: resolve acfs.manifest.yaml merge conflict, add ACFS_DEBUG tracing, propagate s2p env

Resolve nested merge conflict markers in acfs.manifest.yaml that accumulated
from two stacked stash-pop operations. The resolution keeps the more complete
"Updated upstream" side in every conflict region:
- sqlite:/// triple-slash URL (correct for absolute paths)
- Dynamic MCP base path detection ($am_mcp_path) instead of hardcoded /mcp/
- Restart=always (more robust than on-failure for the agent-mail service)
- Both args (--skip-cass) and env (RU_NON_INTERACTIVE=1) for s2p installer
- Full acfs-update wrapper install script (not the empty stash version)

install.sh: enable shell tracing (set -x) when ACFS_DEBUG=true, matching the
hint already present in error messages so users can actually follow the advice.

scripts/generated/install_tools.sh: propagate RU_NON_INTERACTIVE=1 env var to
the s2p verified installer invocation, matching the new env field in the
manifest.

scripts/generated/manifest_index.sh: update SHA256 to match resolved manifest
(verified: 4621af83b89fabea0720347ba3a074a431914f8d8ee74a37cd3203770fce2849).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1077,7 +1077,6 @@ modules:
           unit_dir="$HOME/.config/systemd/user"
           unit_file="$unit_dir/agent-mail.service"
           am_bin="$(command -v am)"
-<<<<<<< Updated upstream
           db_url="sqlite:///${storage_root}/storage.sqlite3"
 
           # Detect MCP base path: Rust am uses /mcp/, Python mcp_agent_mail uses /api/
@@ -1086,9 +1085,6 @@ modules:
           else
               am_mcp_path="/api/"
           fi
-=======
-          db_url="sqlite://${storage_root}/storage.sqlite3"
->>>>>>> Stashed changes
 
           mkdir -p "$storage_root" "$unit_dir"
           cat > "$unit_file" <<UNIT_EOF
@@ -1104,13 +1100,8 @@ modules:
           Environment=DATABASE_URL=$db_url
           Environment=HTTP_ALLOW_LOCALHOST_UNAUTHENTICATED=true
           ExecStartPre=$am_bin migrate
-<<<<<<< Updated upstream
           ExecStart=$am_bin serve-http --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765 --path $am_mcp_path
           Restart=always
-=======
-          ExecStart=$am_bin serve-http --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765 --path /mcp/
-          Restart=on-failure
->>>>>>> Stashed changes
           RestartSec=5
           LimitNOFILE=65536
 
@@ -2613,11 +2604,8 @@ modules:
       tool: s2p
       runner: bash
       url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/source_to_prompt_tui/main/install.sh"
-<<<<<<< Updated upstream
       args: ["--", "--skip-cass"]
-=======
       env: ["RU_NON_INTERACTIVE=1"]
->>>>>>> Stashed changes
     install: []
     verify:
       - s2p --help || s2p --version
@@ -2892,7 +2880,6 @@ modules:
       - mkdir -p ~/.local/bin
       - |
         # Install acfs-update wrapper
-<<<<<<< Updated upstream
         if [[ -n "${ACFS_BOOTSTRAP_DIR:-}" ]] && [[ -f "${ACFS_BOOTSTRAP_DIR}/scripts/lib/nightly_update.sh" ]]; then
           cp "${ACFS_BOOTSTRAP_DIR}/scripts/lib/nightly_update.sh" ~/.acfs/scripts/nightly-update.sh
         elif [[ -f "scripts/lib/nightly_update.sh" ]]; then
@@ -2927,8 +2914,6 @@ modules:
       - mkdir -p ~/.acfs/scripts ~/.config/systemd/user
       - |
         # Install nightly update wrapper script
-=======
->>>>>>> Stashed changes
         if [[ -n "${ACFS_BOOTSTRAP_DIR:-}" ]] && [[ -f "${ACFS_BOOTSTRAP_DIR}/scripts/lib/nightly_update.sh" ]]; then
           cp "${ACFS_BOOTSTRAP_DIR}/scripts/lib/nightly_update.sh" ~/.acfs/scripts/nightly-update.sh
         elif [[ -f "scripts/lib/nightly_update.sh" ]]; then

@@ -38,6 +38,9 @@
 
 set -euo pipefail
 
+# Enable shell tracing when ACFS_DEBUG=true (matches the hint in our error messages)
+[[ "${ACFS_DEBUG:-}" == "true" ]] && set -x
+
 # Prevent apt/dpkg from displaying interactive dialogs (kernel upgrade prompts,
 # debconf questions, etc.) that corrupt the terminal with ncurses escape sequences
 export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

@@ -1017,7 +1017,7 @@ install_utils_s2p() {
                     fi
 
                     if [[ -n "$url" ]] && [[ -n "$expected_sha256" ]]; then
-                        if verify_checksum "$url" "$expected_sha256" "$tool" | run_as_target_runner 'bash' '-s' '--' '--skip-cass'; then
+                        if verify_checksum "$url" "$expected_sha256" "$tool" | run_as_target_runner 'env' 'RU_NON_INTERACTIVE=1' 'bash' '-s' '--' '--skip-cass'; then
                             install_success=true
                         else
                             log_error "utils.s2p: verify_checksum or installer execution failed"

@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 # ============================================================
 # Data-only manifest index. Safe to source.
 
-ACFS_MANIFEST_SHA256="fd0e3e3885bc37854fa3f9aaad3d7537c00208a8f960ad4570e282c40c901526"
+ACFS_MANIFEST_SHA256="4621af83b89fabea0720347ba3a074a431914f8d8ee74a37cd3203770fce2849"
 
 ACFS_MODULES_IN_ORDER=(
   "base.system"
